Duffie argues that the real constraint isn’t on the asset side, but on the liability side of the Fed’s balance sheet, especially reserve balances, paper currency and the Treasur

title_cn: 摩纳哥炸弹杀手嫌疑人在基辅听证会上翻供

summary: One notable group has been absent from the 2026 stock rally: the American tech giants that have charged a nearly four-year bull run.

title: Tech Drives US Stocks Higher as Traders Downplay Iran War Risks
title_cn: 交易员淡化伊朗战争风险，科技股推动美国股市走高
summary: US stocks rose as investors put aside concerns over the latest flare-up between the US and Iran to pile on technology stocks after recent declines spurred dip buying.

title: It’s Not Just Open Source Models Competing on Price
title_cn: 不仅仅是开源模型在价格上竞争

title: Stocks Get Boost From Chipmakers as Oil Declines: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着石油价格下跌，芯片制造商提振股市：市场结束
summary: A resurgence in giant chipmakers powered a rebound on Wall Street, with stocks also rising amid a decline in oil prices as traders looked past fresh hostilities between the US and Iran.

title: Kimmeridge Faults Pace of Devon Energy’s Asset-Sale Efforts
title_cn: 金默里奇批评德文能源公司资产出售的步伐
summary: Kimmeridge Energy Management Co., an outspoken shale investor, criticized Devon Energy Corp.’s divestment program as too slow after the driller’s $25 billion takeover of Coterra Energy Inc.

title: Gold Rebounds as Traders Assess Iran Strikes, Interest-Rate Path
title_cn: 随着交易员评估伊朗袭击和利率走势，黄金反弹
summary: Gold found some support following three days of losses as traders weighed a resumption of fighting in the Middle East and the US Federal Reserve’s interest-rate path.

title: US 30-Year Bond Auction Draws Highest Yield Since 2007
title_cn: 美国30年期债券拍卖收益率创2007年以来最高
summary: An auction of 30-year Treasury bonds Thursday drew the highest yield in nearly 20 years, underscoring how swelling bond supply is driving investors to demand higher returns from government debt.

title: US CLO ETFs Surpass $50B in Total Assets
title_cn: 美国 CLO ETF 总资产超过 50B 美元
summary: Gretchen Lam, CEO of Octagon Credit Investors, joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." US ETFs that buy and sell CLOs now collectively manage more $50 billion after crossing that threshold last week, according to estimates by Bank of America. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Is SpaceX a Value Stock? Fidelity and FTSE Russell Think So
title_cn: SpaceX 是价值股吗？富达和富时罗素也这么认为
summary: SpaceX has made its way into several value-oriented indexes

title: Oil Falls as Traders Expect US-Iran Conflict Will Stay Contained
title_cn: 交易员预计美伊冲突将继续受到控制，油价下跌
summary: Oil fell as traders priced in a limited US-Iran conflict, easing initial concerns that energy infrastructure would come under attack again.

title: Copper Rallies as Risk Assets Shrug Off More US Strikes on Iran
title_cn: 风险资产摆脱美国对伊朗更多打击的影响，铜价上涨
summary: Copper jumped during a broad rally for industrial metals as investors shrugged off a fresh round of US strikes on Iran to track broader gains in risk assets.

title: We Are In A 'Slow-Motion Train Wreck': Bhansali
title_cn: 我们正处于“慢动作火车失事”中：班萨利
summary: Vineer Bhansali, founder of LongTail Alpha, joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." The Fed has kept its benchmark rate steady this year, but support for rate hikes is growing among officials. Nine policymakers penciled in at least one quarter-point hike in 2026 in their latest set of economic projections submitted at their June gathering. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jersey City Shadowed by 15% Tax Hike as Boomtown Faces Reckoning
title_cn: 新兴城市面临清算，泽西城受到 15% 增税的影响
summary: Bloomberg's Nic Querolo joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." After decades of drawing in tens of thousands of new residents as gleaming apartment towers rose near the Hudson River waterfront across from Manhattan, Jersey City has suddenly found itself teetering on the financial brink. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 30-Year Real Yield Near Financial Crisis Level
title_cn: 30年期实际收益率接近金融危机水平
summary: Subadra Rajappa, head of US rates strategy at Société Générale, and Vineer Bhansali, founder of LongTail Alpha, joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Long-end Treasury real yields climbed to the highest in nearly two decades, signaling investors will increasingly need protection from policy uncertainty. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Natural Gas Dives Most in Four Months on Pipes, Algo Trades
title_cn: Algo 交易显示美国天然气在四个月内跌幅最大
summary: US natural gas futures fell more than 6%, the steepest daily price decline since March, as traders weighed a flurry of market-moving pipeline expansion and export terminal updates. Losses were exacerbated as some algorithmic traders moved in a sharply bearish direction.

title: Iran, US Are Communicating With Violence Says Harding
title_cn: 哈丁称伊朗和美国正在以暴力进行交流
summary: The US military attacked Iran for a second day and Tehran retaliated against American allies in the Persian Gulf, raising fears of a return to war after little progress in efforts to secure a diplomatic outcome. Emily Harding, Vice President of the Defense & Security Department at the Center for Strategic and International Studies joins Balance of Power to discuss what this new strikes mean for the region and their relationship with the US. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Spain’s Joint Debt Proposal Queried by Largest EU Economies
title_cn: 西班牙联合债务提案遭到欧盟最大经济体质疑
summary: A Spanish bid to boost joint debt issuance by the European Union was met with skepticism from some of the bloc’s top economies.

title: UPS, FedEx Shares Fall on Growing Threat From Amazon Shipping
title_cn: UPS、联邦快递股价因亚马逊航运日益增长的威胁而下跌
summary: United Parcel Service Inc. and FedEx Corp. shares tumbled after an analyst warned that Amazon.com Inc. is offering inexpensive and increasingly fast delivery services to third-party customers, underscoring the risk posed by the e-commerce giant to traditional shipping firms.

title: Junk Firms Seize on Drought in Buyout Debt to Slash Loan Costs
title_cn: 垃圾公司利用收购债务的干旱来削减贷款成本
summary: Bloomberg's Aaron Weinman joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." The energy-drink maker Celsius, the sneaker firm Skechers and other junk-rated companies are seizing on hot credit markets to secure better terms from lenders, sharply reducing the extra yield their loans offer compared to benchmark borrowing costs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Veja os Três Assuntos Que Marcaram a Semana no Brasil
title_cn: 查看巴西本周的三个主题
summary:
A repórter Beatriz Reis conta quais foram os três assuntos que 
marcaram a semana no Brasil. Com produção de Patricia Xavier e edição de Raphael Almeida. 
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pricey Credit Markets Fuel Anything Funds
title_cn: 昂贵的信贷市场为一切基金提供动力
summary: Bloomberg's Tasos Vossos joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Bond investors are increasingly betting on flexible funds that can buy whatever they like as lofty credit market valuations leave little margin for error. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Zealand Dollar Surges as Economic Data Fuels Rate Hike Bets
title_cn: 经济数据推动加息押注，新西兰元飙升
summary: The New Zealand dollar advanced Thursday to the highest in more than two weeks after strong manufacturing data increased bets on further monetary tightening in the nation.

title: France Seen Dodging Recession as Central Bank Lifts GDP Estimate
title_cn: 法国央行上调 GDP 预期，有望避免经济衰退
summary: The Bank of France raised its short-term growth estimate as activity improved in all sectors in June, indicating the economy will safely avoid a recession.

title: Oil Industry Retained Up to €200 Million of German Fuel Subsidy
title_cn: 石油工业保留了高达 2 亿欧元的德国燃料补贴
summary: Germany’s oil industry retained between €100 million and €200 million from a fuel tax reduction earlier this year that was intended to ease the impact of surging costs on motorists, a government advisory panel found.

title: Chip Stocks Rally on AI Boom | Open Interest 7/9/2026
title_cn: 芯片股因人工智能热潮而上涨 |未平仓合约 7/9/2026
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Chipmakers are powering stocks higher as SK Hynix prepares for its US debut. Pepsi flashes retail warning signs as shoppers pull back. And tensions rise in the Middle East after fresh US-Iran strikes. Plus, Kurt Wagner on Zuckerberg’s AI monetization push, Flexport CEO Ryan Petersen on global shipping risks, and Dan Suzuki on why Fed cuts may beat hikes. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Repricing of 30-Year Treasury Yield Has Just Begun, PGIM’s Peters Says
title_cn: PGIM 的彼得斯表示，30 年期国债收益率的重新定价刚刚开始
summary: The return of the 30-year US Treasury yield above 5% is prompting investors to rethink what they consider an attractive level, according to PGIM’s Gregory Peters.

title: CFTC Blocks for Now CME’s Plan to Offer 24/7 Oil Futures
title_cn: CFTC 暂时阻止 CME 提供 24/7 石油期货的计划
summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has blocked for now CME Group Inc.’s bid to start offering round-the-clock trading in oil futures.

title: Franklin’s Dudley Sees AI Infrastructure Bull Case Through 2027
title_cn: 富兰克林 (Franklin) 的达德利 (Dudley) 认为 2027 年人工智能基础设施前景看好
summary: Franklin Templeton’s Katrina Dudley said the bull case for infrastructure spending on artificial intelligence is winning out over bear arguments and sees the investment theme remaining durable through 2027 and potentially into the year beyond.

title: ING Weighs Venezuela Commodity Deals as Client Requests Rise
title_cn: 随着客户需求增加，ING 评估委内瑞拉大宗商品交易
summary: ING Groep, one of the top financiers of commodity trading, is fielding “a lot” of calls from clients to support Venezuelan natural resource deals as the country revamps exports after years of US sanctions, its new Americas commodity finance head said.

title: Wayve Staff Sold Stock at 10% Discount on Pisces Exchange
title_cn: Wayve 员工在双鱼座交易所以 10% 折扣出售股票
summary: Wayve Technologies Ltd. employees sold shares on London’s new private market at a 10% discount to the self-driving technology startup’s previous valuation, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Real Yield 7/9/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: Societe Generale Americas Head of Research Subadra Rajappa, Longtail Alpha Founder Vineer Bhansali, CreditSights Head of US IG & Macro Strategy Zachary Griffiths, and Octagon Credit Investors CEO Gretchen Lam. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI, Anthropic Hit New Speed Bump With US Government
title_cn: OpenAI、Anthropic 与美国政府达成新的进展
summary: The Trump administration is taking a more active role in reviewing AI models.

title: Former Fed Chairman Bernanke Joins Anthropic Oversight Trust
title_cn: 前美联储主席伯南克加入人类监督信托基金
summary: Former Federal Reserve Chairman Ben Bernanke has been appointed to Anthropic’s long-term benefit trust, an oversight body meant to keep the artificial intelligence company accountable to its public mission. Ed Ludlow reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: See Amazon Concessions As Buying Opportunity: Griffiths
title_cn: 将亚马逊优惠视为购买机会：Griffiths
summary: Zachary Griffiths, head of US IG & macro strategy at CreditSights, joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Amazon borrowed $25 billion in an eight-part offering that garnered about $62 billion in peak investor demand, about half the orders it attracted for its prior $37 billion deal in March. The offering is heaping pressure on the broader tech space, with the sector among the worst performers in the US high-grade secondary market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Robotics Isn't Living Up to the Hype
title_cn: 机器人技术并没有像人们宣传的那样
summary: At the Automate Show, Bloomberg Opinion columnist Thomas Black saw a lot of robots, but it was clear to him that there is still a long way to go before widespread, everyday use of the machines. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman Bans Staff Prediction Markets Bets on Finance, Politics
title_cn: 高盛禁止员工预测市场押注金融和政治
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. has banned employees from trading on prediction markets except for sports and entertainment bets, in one of the most pointed efforts by a Wall Street firm grappling with the new regulatory issues raised by the boom in betting on events.

title: End of an Era: Longtime Podcast Hosts Go Quiet as Video Dominates
title_cn: 一个时代的终结：视频占据主导地位，长期播客主持人陷入沉默
summary: Veteran hosts like Marc Maron, Al Franken and the Culture Gabfest crew are hanging up their headphones and setting down their mics.

title: SK Hynix US Listing Demand Soars | Bloomberg Tech 7/09/2026
title_cn: SK海力士赴美上市需求猛增 |彭博科技 7/09/2026
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow takes a look at SK Hynix's oversubscribed US listing, priming the Korean memory maker for the biggest ever foreign first-time-share-sale in America. Plus, Micron boosts its spending on new American plants to $250 billion to meet surging memory demand; and Meta unveils its latest AI model, pricing it aggressively and talking up its agentic capabilities versus Google's Gemini. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street's First Take on SpaceX
title_cn: 华尔街对 SpaceX 的首次关注
summary: The quiet period has ended for underwriters of SpaceX's IPO, and analysts are starting to publish their views on Elon Musk-led company. William Blair's Louie DiPalma launched coverage with a bullish rating, citing the company's growing advantage as rival Blue Origin turns to outside investors. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Space Boom's Biggest Bottleneck
title_cn: 太空繁荣的最大瓶颈
summary: Money is flooding into the space economy, from SpaceX's record IPO to Blue Origin's first outside fundraising effort. But while capital is abundant, rocket launches are not. Founders Fund Partner and Varda Space Chairman Delian Asparouhov explains why access to space could become the industry's biggest bottleneck. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix Draws Massive Investor Demand
title_cn: SK海力士吸引了大量投资者需求
summary: SK Hynix’s US listing is more than seven times oversubscribed, according to sources, highlighting strong investor appetite despite recent volatility in the Korean memory chipmaker’s shares. Bloomberg's Bailey Lipschultz and Ian King join Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta’s Zuckerberg Says Exploring AI Cloud Business Makes Sense
title_cn: Meta 的扎克伯格表示探索人工智能云业务很有意义
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. needs all the computing power it can get, Chief Executive Officer Mark Zuckerberg said, but in a market starved for resources necessary to run and develop artificial intelligence products he’s also considering whether some of Meta’s AI infrastructure could be more valuable if rented to outsiders.

title: OpenAI Unveils ChatGPT Work Agent to Field Tasks for Hours
title_cn: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT 工作代理以执行数小时的现场任务
summary: OpenAI is introducing a new artificial intelligence agent that’s meant to field a wider range of complex tasks for hours at a time, bolstering its push to appeal to more business professionals.

title: KPMG UK to Slash 200 Back Office Roles in Latest Round of Cuts
title_cn: 毕马威英国公司将在最新一轮裁员中削减 200 名后台职位
summary: KPMG UK is cutting 10% of staff across its support teams, according to a spokesperson for the company, in the latest round of job cuts by the Big Four accountancy firm.

title: Exclusive: Zuckerberg on Meta's AI Push
title_cn: 独家：扎克伯格谈 Meta 的人工智能推动
summary: Meta is making its biggest AI monetization move yet. Bloomberg's Kurt Wagner had an exclusive interview with Mark Zuckerberg. They talked about why the company is betting on ultra-low API pricing to win developers, how Meta plans to turn massive AI investments into real revenue, and what the AI transformation means for employees, investors, and the race against OpenAI and Google. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Finds a New Way to Help Investors Avoid Elon Musk
title_cn: 华尔街找到了一种帮助投资者避开埃隆·马斯克的新方法
summary: For every investor who wants more Elon Musk, Wall Street increasingly has an ETF. Now it’s planning some for investors who want less.

title: Former Fed Chairman Ben Bernanke Joins Anthropic Oversight Trust
title_cn: 前美联储主席本·伯南克加入人类监督信托基金
summary: Former Federal Reserve Chairman Ben Bernanke has been appointed to Anthropic’s long-term benefit trust, an oversight body meant to keep the artificial intelligence company accountable to its public mission.

title: California Lawmakers Seek to Boost Reserves Ahead of Hot AI IPOs
title_cn: 加州立法者寻求在热门人工智能 IPO 之前增加储备
summary: The AI-driven stock market rally has bolstered California’s coffers, sending revenue soaring. Now lawmakers are asking voters to overhaul the state’s financial reserves to capture more of any future windfall.

title: Bitcoin-Backed Muni Bond Fails to Get New Hampshire Sign Off
title_cn: 比特币支持的市政债券未能获得新罕布什尔州批准
summary: New Hampshire’s executive council voted down a proposal to bring the first Bitcoin-backed bond to the municipal market.

title: AI Office Demand Seen Spreading Beyond NYC, San Francisco
title_cn: 人工智能办公需求蔓延至纽约、旧金山以外地区
summary: AI-focused tech firms are stepping up searches for office space, and New York and San Francisco won’t be the only cities to benefit from their fast expansion.

title: B Capital-Led Group Buys Russell Investments
title_cn: B Capital 主导的集团收购 Russell Investments
summary: Russell Investments is being acquired by a group of investors led by B Capital Group and California Public Employees’ Retirement System to ready the asset manager for the AI era. Silla Brush reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Boosts US Spending to $250 Billion to Feed Memory Boom
title_cn: 美光将美国支出增加至 2500 亿美元以推动内存繁荣
summary: Micron Technology Inc. plans to increase its spending on new plants in the US to $250 billion to help meet unprecedented demand for its memory chips fueled by the global artificial intelligence boom.

title: Dronemaker Helsing Alters Staff Stock Plan Before Funding Round
title_cn: 无人机制造商赫尔辛在融资前改变员工股票计划
summary: European defense startup Helsing has overhauled its internal share program, alienating some staff as the company finalizes its biggest funding round to date.

title: ION Platform’s Bonds Get a Boost as Revenue and Profit Rise
title_cn: ION 平台的债券随着收入和利润的增长而上涨
summary: ION Platform reported stronger earnings and lower cash payments to its parent company in the second quarter, reassuring holders of beaten-down bonds issued by the financial software provider.

title: Fed’s Williams Says AI Is Now His Main Inflation Concern
title_cn: 美联储威廉姆斯表示人工智能现在是他主要的通胀担忧
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of New York President John Williams said that among the drivers of inflation in the US, he’s most focused on demand driven by artificial intelligence. And if that demand persists, it could force the central bank to raise interest rates.

title: Mitch McConnell’s Absence Reignites Debate Over Aging Politicians
title_cn: 米奇·麦康奈尔的缺席再次引发有关老龄化政客的争论
summary: Assurances that the senator is working from the hospital won’t quiet scrutiny of aging lawmakers.

title: Khamenei’s Funeral Concluded Amid Renewed US, Iran Fighting
title_cn: 哈梅内伊葬礼在美国与伊朗重燃战火中结束
summary: Iran concluded the funeral of its slain Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, more than four months after he was assassinated in US-Israeli airstrikes and amid renewed fighting with the US.

title: Burnham Set to Become Next UK Premier With Majority of MP Votes
title_cn: 伯纳姆将以多数议员选票成为下一任英国首相
summary: Andy Burnham’s path to becoming the next UK prime minister looks certain after a vast majority of Labour MPs formally nominated him to be the next party leader.

title: Reeves’ Fiscal Rules Don’t Stop UK Debt Rising, Tories Warn
title_cn: 保守党警告说，里夫斯的财政规则并不能阻止英国债务上升
summary: Labour’s fiscal rules don’t work because they allow the national debt to ratchet ever higher, the main opposition Conservative Party’s Treasury spokesman, Mel Stride, said.

title: Lagarde Says She’s Not a Candidate for French Election: Euronews
title_cn: 拉加德表示她不是法国大选的候选人：欧洲新闻
summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde said she’ll try to have her voice heard during next year’s French presidential election, while declining that she’s pondering a campaign herself.

title: US, Iran Trade Airstrikes | Balance of Power 7/9/2026
title_cn: 美国、伊朗贸易空袭|权力平衡 7/9/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu discusses the latest from the Trump Administration. On today's show, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and Vice President of the Defense & Security Department at the Center for Strategic and International Studies Emily Harding. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Saudis Eye Canada Assets as PIF Accepts Carney Invite to Toronto
title_cn: PIF 接受卡尼访问多伦多的邀请，沙特关注加拿大资产
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney said Saudi Arabian investors are interested in Canadian energy, mining and infrastructure, as he concluded the first visit of a Canadian leader to the Middle Eastern kingdom in 26 years.

title: Orban Call to Protest Hungary President Ouster Draws Small Crowd
title_cn: 欧尔班呼吁抗议匈牙利总统罢免吸引了一小群人
summary: Former Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s call to protest his successor’s bid to oust the head of state drew a small crowd, underscoring his dwindling influence less than three months after a landslide election defeat.

title: Can a Man Wearing a Trash Can Expose Farage’s Weakness?
title_cn: 一个穿着垃圾的男人能暴露法拉奇的弱点吗？
summary: Can a man wearing a trash can really take on Reform UK’s Nigel Farage? Lizzy Burden explains what you need to know about Count Binface. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham to Scrap Treasury Split, Empower PM’s Office Instead
title_cn: 伯纳姆将废除财政部拆分，转而赋予总理办公室权力
summary: The UK’s likely next prime minister Andy Burnham will look to give his own office more oversight of economic policy, but will scrap plans to break up the Treasury in the immediate future, a key ally said.

title: Egypt Holds Rates a Third Time With US-Iran Peace Push at Risk
title_cn: 埃及第三次维持利率不变，美伊和平进程面临风险
summary: Egypt left interest rates unchanged for a third consecutive meeting, opting for caution with a fragile US-Iran ceasefire at risk of unraveling.

title: US, Iran Trade Airstrikes as Fears Grow of a Return to War
title_cn: 由于担心重新爆发战争，美国和伊朗进行空袭
summary:
The US military attacked Iran for a second day and Tehran retaliated against American allies in the Persian Gulf, raising fears of a return to war after little progress in efforts to secure a diplomatic outcome.
Dan Williams, Middle East Reporter based in Jerusalem, discusses the latest on the conflict. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Germany Proposes Consumer Levy to Fund Emergency Gas Reserve
title_cn: 德国提议征收消费者税以资助紧急天然气储备
summary: The German government has proposed adding a surcharge to consumer energy bills to help finance a strategic natural gas reserve designed to keep supplies flowing in a worst-case crisis.

title: US, Iran Trade Airstrikes as Fears Grow of a Return to War
title_cn: 由于担心重新爆发战争，美国和伊朗进行空袭
summary: The US military attacked Iran for a second day and Tehran retaliated against American allies in the Persian Gulf, raising fears of a return to war after little progress in efforts to secure a diplomatic outcome.

title: Merz’s Reforms for Germany Get Fitch Cheer But No Big Applause
title_cn: 默茨对德国的改革获得了惠誉的欢呼，但没有得到热烈的掌声
summary: Germany’s new reform package amounts to a step in the right direction but is still no game changer in addressing the troubles of its economy, according to Fitch Ratings.

title: Hormuz Ship Insurance Demand Drops as Owners Get Nervous
title_cn: 由于船东感到紧张，霍尔木兹船舶保险需求下降
summary: London marine insurers have been seeing fewer inquiries for journeys to transit the Strait of Hormuz and some said the cost of cover had risen, in a sign of growing caution from shipowners as the US and Iran exchange attacks.

title: GOP Candidates Break With Trump on Data Centers to Boost Midterm Odds
title_cn: 共和党候选人在数据中心问题上与特朗普决裂以提高中期胜算
summary: Progressive lawmakers Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders led the first wave of opposition to data centers. Now Republican candidates around the US are seizing on the fervor even as President Donald Trump actively courts tech titans and promotes the rapid, streamlined expansion of the energy-hungry facilities.

title: Carney Gets High Marks on Economy Despite Recession Talk, Poll Says
title_cn: 民意调查显示，尽管有经济衰退的言论，卡尼在经济方面仍获得高分
summary: Canadians support Mark Carney’s approach to managing the economy, even though he’s presided over the worst first year of growth for a prime minister since at least 1963.

title: ActBlue Pulls In $586 Million for Democrats as Midterms Approach
title_cn: 随着中期选举的临近，ActBlue 为民主党筹集 5.86 亿美元
summary: ActBlue raised $586 million for Democratic candidates and causes in the second quarter, a record amount that will enhance the party’s fortunes as it prepares to confront Republicans in midterm elections that are projected to be the most expensive in US history.

title: EU to Favor European Providers in Public Service Contracts
title_cn: 欧盟将在公共服务合同中支持欧洲提供商
summary: The European Union is finalizing sweeping changes to its procurement rules that will allow national governments favor European suppliers in critical public services.

title: Why Did Trump Switch Planes on His Way Back From NATO?
title_cn: 特朗普为何在从北约返回途中调换飞机？
summary: President Donald Trump’s return to the US from the NATO summit in Turkey took a detour when he switched Air Force One planes at a military base in the United Kingdom. Annmarie Hordern reports from Ankara. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How the Democrats Will Replace Platner on Maine’s Senate Ballot
title_cn: 民主党将如何在缅因州参议院投票中取代普拉特纳
summary: Maine Democrats are racing to salvage their bid to defeat Sen. Susan Collins after Graham Platner suspended his campaign Wednesday evening.

title: Trump Gives Ukraine a Boost, Bolstering West’s Optimism
title_cn: 特朗普提振乌克兰，提振西方乐观情绪
summary: A Patriot missiles promise and praise for Zelenskyy adds to Kyiv’s momentum

title: Merz Says Political Fringes Will Send Germany to ‘the Abyss’
title_cn: 默茨表示政治边缘将使德国陷入“深渊”
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz made a plea for Germany’s political middle ground as he touted a comprehensive reform agenda — and warned that the rise of fringe parties including the far right risks sending the country “into the abyss.”

title: Platner Suspends Maine Senate Bid After Assault Allegation
title_cn: 袭击指控后普拉特纳暂停缅因州参议院竞选
summary: Graham Platner suspended his US Senate campaign in Maine following a sexual assault allegation that caused his support from fellow Democrats to collapse, throwing a crucial race for the party into turmoil.

title: Talarico’s $30 Million Haul Crushes Paxton in Texas Race
title_cn: Talarico 在德克萨斯州比赛中以 3000 万美元的成绩击败 Paxton
summary: Texas Democrat James Talarico received $30 million in second-quarter donations in his campaign for US Senate, more than tripling the amount Republican challenger Ken Paxton amassed in what will be one of the most expensive campaigns of the November midterm elections.

title: El legado de Fujimori expone los límites de la estrategia anti-China de Trump en Perú
title_cn: 藤森的遗产暴露了特朗普在秘鲁反华战略的局限性
summary: Keiko Fujimori podría ser el tipo de líder que Donald Trump desea en América Latina. Pero los profundos vínculos de Perú con China muestran lo difícil que será para Washington revertir los avances de Pekín en la región.

title: Starmer Exits World Stage Unsure His Foreign Policy Will Endure
title_cn: 斯塔默退出世界舞台，不确定他的外交政策能否持久
summary: Keir Starmer’s swansong trip as Britain’s prime minister to the NATO summit this week sought to cement a shaky diplomatic legacy for a successor who’s untested in the international arena.

title: Stranded Oil Ships Clear Out of Gulf as Owners Get Wary Again
title_cn: 船东再次保持警惕，搁浅的油船已离开海湾
summary: A huge backlog of oil tankers that got stuck inside the Persian Gulf because of the Iran war has almost cleared out — just in time for a fresh military flare up to create renewed uncertainty about how safe the region is for ships.
